title: Contact — Jude Hill
description: Start a web design project with Jude Hill. Reach out from Eugene, Oregon for portfolios, small business sites, and landing pages.

blocks.title: Let's talk.
blocks.subtitle: Based in Eugene, Oregon and excited to start working with you. Send me an email with a few sentences about your project and I'll get back to you shortly.

blocks.heading: Reach me here
blocks.body: Email is best for project inquiries, but you can also find me on social platforms.

blocks.heading: What I'm good for
blocks.body: Personal sites, small business sites, portfolios, landing pages, and just about anything that needs to look clean and load fast.
